categories.title: Recent Pull Requests in elizaOS/eliza Repository

content.text:
Three recent pull requests have been submitted to the elizaOS/eliza repository addressing various fixes:

1. PR #4327 by wtfsayo normalizes plugin commands across v1 and v2 versions.

2. PR #4325 by UD1sto fixes GPU recognition issues specifically in Docker container environments.

3. PR #4326 by detrina corrects an error in the MemoryCacheAdapter.md documentation file.

Current cryptocurrency prices:

- WETH (Wrapped Ethereum) is trading at $1,613.03
- SOL (Solana) is trading at $139.81

Between April 20-21, 2025, the elizaos/eliza repository saw moderate activity with 3 new pull requests, of which 1 was merged. There were no new issues reported during this period. The repository maintained an active community with 6 contributors working on the project during this timeframe.
sources: text: From 2025-04-20 to 2025-04-21, elizaos/eliza had 3 new PRs (1 merged), 0 new issues, and 6 active contributors.

categories.title: Added Default Agents Based on Organization

content.text: A pull request (#4323) was merged that adds default agents based on the organization. This update allows the system to automatically assign agents according to organizational settings.

The provided source only mentions 'Top contributors for elizaOS/eliza' without providing any specific details about who these contributors are or their contributions.
